race.comment: ROWEINER'S DANCE (2) is a 13-time winner here who will be high on confidence following back-to-back victories. Winning rider Semmens reunites in the saddle and again gets the benefit of her 2kg claim. Will prove very hard to toss. COLE'S BEST (8) got the chocolates over this course and distance last time out and is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from gate two. Shapes as a leading contender. GOING NUCLEAR (5) resumes here but has a solid first-up record and is another to get some weight off. Top-three commodity. DEMON AWARD (3) has only missed a drum once in six first-up attempts and can run a big race from the inside marble while fresh. RUSSIAN MINT (10) next best.
